name: edge-cloud-agent
description: Edge node agent for distributed compute orchestration

scripts.agent-1: set PORT=4001&& set NODE_ID=edge-local-01&& set NODE_NAME=Local Edge Node 1&& node server.js
scripts.agent-2: set PORT=4002&& set NODE_ID=edge-local-02&& set NODE_NAME=Local Edge Node 2&& node server.js
scripts.agent-3: set PORT=4003&& set NODE_ID=edge-local-03&& set NODE_NAME=Local Edge Node 3&& node server.js
